name: figuscan-mundial-v10
description: PWA local-first para organizar figuritas del Mundial.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist public && cp index.html app.js styles.css fs-safe-fix.js fs-ui-fix.css manifest.webmanifest service-worker.js dist/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -R assets dist/assets 2>/dev/null || true && cp -R public/* dist/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp index.html app.js styles.css fs-safe-fix.js fs-ui-fix.css manifest.webmanifest service-worker.js public/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp -R assets public/assets 2>/dev/null || true
